_meta._comment: My Golf Scores — regional course seed file (Kamloops area). Loaded at first launch and merged into localStorage courseCache.
_instructions: Keys are course IDs (strings). API courses use positive integer IDs matching GolfCourseAPI.com.
Manual courses (no API record) use NEGATIVE integer IDs: '-1', '-2', etc.
Each entry: id, club_name, course_name, location {address?, city, state, country, latitude?, longitude?},
tee_name, course_rating, slope_rating, number_of_holes, par_total, total_yards,
To add a manual course: copy an existing entry, assign a new negative ID, fill in the data, append at end.

location.address: 5045 Boulder Mountain Rd, Barrière, BC V0E 1E0, Canada
3125 Tranquille Rd, Kamloops, BC V2B 8B6, Canada

5.notes: 9-hole course played twice for 18. Some holes use different tee boxes on back 9 (reflected in yardages). Tee names WHITE/BLUE and RED/GOLD indicate mixed tee sets.

location.address: 4725 East Trans Canada Hwy, Kamloops, BC V2C 4S4

7.notes: 9-hole course played twice for 18. Different tee boxes used on back 9 for all holes.
